r[t]}})})})),s=o(),c=async(e,t)=>{let n={Accept:`image/jpeg,image/png,image/svg+xml,*/*`};try{let r=t?await fetch(e):await fetch(e,{headers:n});if(!r.ok)throw Error(`Failed to fetch asset: ${r.statusText}`);return new Uint8Array(await r.arrayBuffer())}catch(t){return console.error(`Error fetching asset from ${e}:`,t),null}};const l=async(e,t)=>{let n=await c(e,t);if(!n)return null;try{return t?await(0,s.decodeFont)(n):await(0,s.decodeImage)(n)}catch(t){return console.error(`Error decoding asset from ${e}:`,t),null}},u=async({font:e,image:t,asset:n})=>{!e&&!t||(e?(n.setFont(e),e.unref()):t&&(n.setRenderImage(t),t.unref()))},d=e=>e.toLowerCase().replace(` `,`-`).replace(`.svg`,``).replace(`.json`,``).replace(`.png`,``).replace(`psd`,``).replace(`.jpg`,``).replace(`.jpeg`,``).replace(`.ttf`,``).replace(`.otf`,``).replace(`txt`,``),f=(e,t)=>{!e||!t||Object.keys(t).filter(e=>t[e]!==null).forEach(n=>{if(n.includes(`/`)){let r=n.lastIndexOf(`/`),i=n.substring(0,r),a=n.substring(r+1);e.activeArtboard===i?e.setTextRunValue(a,t[n]):e.setTextRunValueAtPath(a,t[n],i)}else e.setTextRunValue(n,t[n])})},p=(e,t)=>{!e||!t||Object.keys(t).filter(e=>t[e]!==null).forEach(n=>{if(n.includes(`.`)){let[r,i]=n.split(`.`),a=e.viewModel?.(r);if(a){let e=a.string(i);e?e.value=t[n]:console.warn(`String property "${i}" not found in nested view model "${r}"`)}else console.warn(`Nested view model instance "${r}" not found`)}else{let r=e.string(n);r?r.value=t[n]:console.warn(`String property "${n}" not found in view model`)}})},m=(e,t)=>{!e||!t||Object.entries(t).forEach(([t,n])=>{let r=e.enum(t);r&&(r.value=n)})},h=(e,t)=>{!e||!t||Object.entries(t).forEach(([t,n])=>{let r=e.boolean(t);r&&(r.value=n)})},g=async(e,t)=>{!e||!t||await Promise.all(Object.entries(t).map(async([t,n])=>{try{let r=e.image(t);if(!r){console.warn(`Image property "${t}" not found in view model`);return}let i=await fetch(n);if(!i.ok)throw Error(`HTTP "${t}":`,e)}}))};export{h as a,p as c,f as i,o as l,d as n,m as o,u as r,g as s,l as t,i as u};
//# sourceMappingURL=utils-B3qOJZFi.js.map
